hooks.command:
python3 -c "import sys,runpy;from pathlib import Path;n='session-start.py';p=next((str(d/'.claude'/'hooks'/n) for d in [Path.cwd(),*Path.cwd().parents] if (d/'.claude'/'hooks'/n).is_file()),None)
if p: sys.argv=[p]+sys.argv[1:]; runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__')"

python3 -c "import sys,runpy;from pathlib import Path;n='bridge-hook.py';p=next((str(d/'.claude'/'hooks'/n) for d in [Path.cwd(),*Path.cwd().parents] if (d/'.claude'/'hooks'/n).is_file()),None)
if p: sys.argv=[p]+sys.argv[1:]; runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__')" session-start

if p: sys.argv=[p]+sys.argv[1:]; runpy.run_path(p,run_name='__main__')" session-end

python3 -c "import sys,runpy;from pathlib import Path;n='bridge-hook.py';p=next((str(d/'.claude'/'hooks'/n) for d in [Path.cwd(),*Path.cwd().parents] if (d/'.claude'/'hooks'/n).is_file()),None)
